visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark, styled hair, wearing a black shirt with a shiny, patterned silver and black vest. He has a serious and intense expression as he speaks. The background is a dimly lit, greenish-hued room with wooden paneling and a framed picture on the wall. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld perspective. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic instrumental track featuring a percussive beat that creates a suspenseful and slightly menacing atmosphere. The camera pans slightly to the right, shifting focus to another man with short, graying hair. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket and looks on with a concerned and slightly bewildered expression. The first man is now in the foreground, his back partially to the camera, as he continues to speak. The background remains the same dimly lit, green-toned interior. A man speaks in a low, serious, and slightly aggressive tone, his voice filled with suspicion as he questions, "Chàng gā, sāng gèn pǎi nǎi?" (Where are you two going?).
